result.summary: There are a couple of visible layout issues: some content is clipped at the right edge, and a top navigation tab is cut off. The page otherwise appears functional, but the horizontal spacing/overflow looks broken in several sections.

issues.description: The top category row is horizontally clipped, with the last tab partially cut off ('Hot Ga...') off the right edge.
issues.suggestion: Adjust the tab container width, spacing, or scrolling behavior so the full last tab is visible or clearly scrollable.

issues.description: Several game tiles in the content carousels are cut off on the right side, leaving partial cards visible and some text/prize elements truncated.
issues.suggestion: Fix the carousel/card sizing and overflow so partially hidden tiles are intentional and aligned, or show full cards within the viewport.

issues.description: The bottom navigation bar and content spacing feel tight, with elements sitting very close to the screen edges.
issues.suggestion: Add a bit more padding/margin around the affected sections to improve visual balance and avoid accidental clipping on smaller screens.
